case_title: JALA SAI INVESTMENTS LLC VS. ALBERTO TORRES ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TORRES, ALBERTO

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 75000384), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JALA SAI INVESTMENTS LLC SERVED OCT-19-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TORRES, ALBERTO

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JALA SAI INVESTMENTS LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TORRES, ALBERTO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2084 MISSION STREET #309 CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CA 94110, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 75000384)
DECLARATION OF HOWARD OLSEN IN SUPPORT OF CLERK'S JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 75000384) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JALA SAI INVESTMENTS LLC
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JALA SAI INVESTMENTS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT TORRES, ALBERTO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $46.66/DAY (TRANSACTION ID # 75000384) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JALA SAI INVESTMENTS LLC
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (RENT DUE AFTER 3/31/2022) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JALA SAI INVESTMENTS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT TORRES, ALBERTO DOES 1 TO 10
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 75000384) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 75000384) AS TO DEFENDANT TORRES, ALBERTO
VERIFICATION BY LANDLORD REGARDING RENTAL ASSISTANCE-UNLAWFUL DETAINER (TRANSACTION ID # 75000384) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JALA SAI INVESTMENTS LLC
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT TORRES, ALBERTO
